title: TypeScript library generator
description: Generate a TypeScript library for this workspace.

name.description: The name of the new library.
name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the new library?

bundler.description: The bundler to use. Choosing 'none' means this library is not buildable.

unitTestRunner.description: Test runner to use for unit tests.

testEnvironment.description: The test environment to use if unitTestRunner is set to jest or vitest.

skipEslint.description: Skip creating an ESLint configuration file for the project.

skipCspell.description: Skip creating a CSpell configuration file for the project.

skipTestConfig.description: Skip creating a Jest or Vitest configuration file for the project.

globals.description: Allow vitest to inject jest-like API's into the testing environment.

react.description: Indicate that the project uses React.js.

rollupExternals.description: An array of values to add to the `rollupOptions.external` configuration field.

swc.description: Use the SWC compiler instead of babel. Only relevant for projects using React.js.
